3namespace App\Models\Account;
4
5use App\Traits\HasUuid;
6use App\Models\User\User;
7use App\Models\Contact\Tag;
8use App\Models\Journal\Day;
9use App\Models\User\Module;
10use Illuminate\Support\Str;
11use App\Models\Contact\Call;
12use App\Models\Contact\Debt;
13use App\Models\Contact\Gift;
14use App\Models\Contact\Note;
15use App\Models\Contact\Task;
16use App\Traits\Subscription;
17use App\Models\Journal\Entry;
18use App\Models\Contact\Gender;
19use App\Models\Contact\Address;
20use App\Models\Contact\Contact;
21use App\Models\Contact\Message;

37use App\Models\Contact\ContactFieldType;
38use App\Models\Contact\LifeEventCategory;
39use App\Models\Relationship\Relationship;
40use App\Models\Relationship\RelationshipType;
41use App\Models\Relationship\RelationshipTypeGroup;

43use App\Services\Auth\Population\PopulateModulesTable;

46use App\Services\Auth\Population\PopulateContactFieldTypesTable;

48/**
49 * @property int $reminders_count
50 * @property int $notes_count
51 * @property int $activities_count
52 * @property int $gifts_count
53 * @property int $tasks_count
54 */
55class Account extends Model
56{
57    use Subscription, HasUuid;
58
59    /**
60     * The attributes that aren't mass assignable.
61     *
62     * @var array<string>|bool
63     */
64    protected $guarded = ['id'];
65
66    /**
67     * The attributes that are mass assignable.
68     *
69     * @var array<string>
70     */
71    protected $fillable = [
72        'number_of_invitations_sent',
73        'api_key',
74        'default_time_reminder_is_sent',
75        'default_gender_id',
76    ];
77
78    /**
79     * The attributes that should be cast to native types.
80     *
81     * @var array<string, string>
82     */
83    protected $casts = [
84        'has_access_to_paid_version_for_free' => 'boolean',
85    ];
86
87    /**
88     * Get the activity records associated with the account.
89     *
90     * @return HasMany
91     */
92    public function activities()
93    {
94        return $this->hasMany(Activity::class);
95    }
96
97    /**
98     * Get the contact records associated with the account.
99     *
100     * @return HasMany
101     */
102    public function allContacts()
103    {
104        return $this->hasMany(Contact::class);
105    }
106
107    /**
108     * Get the addressBook's contacts.
109     *
110     * @param  string|null  $addressBookName
111     * @return HasMany<Contact>
112     */
113    public function contacts(string $addressBookName = null)
114    {
115        $contacts = $this->allContacts();
116
117        return $addressBookName
118            ? $contacts->addressBook($this->id, $addressBookName)
119            : $contacts->addressBook();
120    }
121
122    /**
123     * Get the invitations associated with the account.
124     *
125     * @return HasMany
126     */
127    public function invitations()
128    {
129        return $this->hasMany(Invitation::class);
130    }
131
132    /**
133     * Get the debt records associated with the account.
134     *
135     * @return HasMany
136     */
137    public function debts()
138    {
139        return $this->hasMany(Debt::class);
140    }
141
142    /**
143     * Get the gift records associated with the account.
144     *
145     * @return HasMany
146     */
147    public function gifts()
148    {
149        return $this->hasMany(Gift::class);
150    }
151
152    /**
153     * Get the note records associated with the account.
154     *
155     * @return HasMany
156     */
157    public function notes()
158    {
159        return $this->hasMany(Note::class)->orderBy('created_at', 'desc');
160    }
161
162    /**

164     *
165     * @return HasMany

171

463     * Get the Weather records associated with the account.
464     *
465     * @return HasMany
466     */
467    public function weathers()
468    {
469        return $this->hasMany(Weather::class);
470    }

474     *
475     * @return HasMany
476     */
477    public function places()
478    {
479        return $this->hasMany(Place::class);
480    }

487    public function addresses()
488    {
489        return $this->hasMany(Address::class);
490    }

494     *

496     */
497    public function addressBooks()
498    {
499        return $this->hasMany(AddressBook::class);
500    }

504     *

508    {

541
542    /**
543     * Populates the Activity Type table right after an account is
544     * created.
545     */
546    public function populateActivityTypeTable()
547    {
548        $defaultActivityTypeCategories = DB::table('default_activity_type_categories')->get();
549
550        foreach ($defaultActivityTypeCategories as $defaultActivityTypeCategory) {
551            $activityTypeCategoryId = DB::table('activity_type_categories')->insertGetId([
552                'account_id' => $this->id,
553                'translation_key' => $defaultActivityTypeCategory->translation_key,
554            ]);
555
556            $defaultActivityTypes = DB::table('default_activity_types')
557                ->where('default_activity_type_category_id', $defaultActivityTypeCategory->id)
558                ->get();
559
560            foreach ($defaultActivityTypes as $defaultActivityType) {
561                DB::table('activity_types')->insert([
562                    'account_id' => $this->id,
563                    'activity_type_category_id' => $activityTypeCategoryId,
564                    'translation_key' => $defaultActivityType->translation_key,
565                ]);
566            }
567        }
568    }
569
570    /**
571     * Populates the default genders in a new account.
572     *
573     * @return void
574     */
575    public function populateDefaultGendersTable()
576    {
577        Gender::create(['type' => Gender::MALE, 'name' => trans('app.gender_male'), 'account_id' => $this->id]);
578        Gender::create(['type' => Gender::FEMALE, 'name' => trans('app.gender_female'), 'account_id' => $this->id]);
579        Gender::create(['type' => Gender::OTHER, 'name' => trans('app.gender_none'), 'account_id' => $this->id]);
580    }
581
582    /**
583     * Populates the default reminder rules in a new account.
584     *
585     * @return void
586     */
587    public function populateDefaultReminderRulesTable()
588    {
589        ReminderRule::create(['number_of_days_before' => 7, 'account_id' => $this->id, 'active' => 1]);
590        ReminderRule::create(['number_of_days_before' => 30, 'account_id' => $this->id, 'active' => 1]);
591    }
592
593    /**
594     * Populates the default relationship types in a new account.
595     *
596     * @return void
597     */
598    public function populateRelationshipTypeGroupsTable($ignoreTableAlreadyMigrated = false)
599    {
600        $defaultRelationshipTypeGroups = DB::table('default_relationship_type_groups')->get();
601        foreach ($defaultRelationshipTypeGroups as $defaultRelationshipTypeGroup) {
602            if (! $ignoreTableAlreadyMigrated || $defaultRelationshipTypeGroup->migrated == 0) {
603                DB::table('relationship_type_groups')->insert([
604                    'account_id' => $this->id,
605                    'name' => $defaultRelationshipTypeGroup->name,
606                    'delible' => $defaultRelationshipTypeGroup->delible,
607                ]);
608            }
609        }
610    }
611
612    /**
613     * Populate the relationship types table based on the default ones.
614     *
615     * @return void
616     */
617    public function populateRelationshipTypesTable($migrateOnlyNewTypes = false)
618    {
619        if ($migrateOnlyNewTypes) {
620            $defaultRelationshipTypes = DB::table('default_relationship_types')->where('migrated', 0)->get();
621        } else {
622            $defaultRelationshipTypes = DB::table('default_relationship_types')->get();
623        }
624
625        foreach ($defaultRelationshipTypes as $defaultRelationshipType) {
626            $defaultRelationshipTypeGroup = DB::table('default_relationship_type_groups')
627                ->where('id', $defaultRelationshipType->relationship_type_group_id)
628                ->first();
629
630            $relationshipTypeGroup = $this->getRelationshipTypeGroupByType($defaultRelationshipTypeGroup->name);
631
632            if ($relationshipTypeGroup) {
633                RelationshipType::create([
634                    'account_id' => $this->id,
635                    'name' => $defaultRelationshipType->name,
636                    'name_reverse_relationship' => $defaultRelationshipType->name_reverse_relationship,
637                    'relationship_type_group_id' => $relationshipTypeGroup->id,
638                    'delible' => $defaultRelationshipType->delible,
639                ]);
640            }
641        }
642    }
643
644    /**
645     * Create a new account and associate a new User.
646     *
647     * @param  string  $first_name
648     * @param  string  $last_name
649     * @param  string  $email
650     * @param  string  $password
651     * @param  string  $ipAddress
652     * @return self
653     */
654    public static function createDefault($first_name, $last_name, $email, $password, $ipAddress = null, $lang = null)
655    {
656        // create new account
657        $account = new self;
658        $account->api_key = Str::random(30);
659        $account->created_at = now();
660        $account->save();
661
662        try {
663            // create the first user for this account
664            $user = app(CreateUser::class)->execute([
665                'account_id' => $account->id,
666                'first_name' => $first_name,
667                'last_name' => $last_name,
668                'email' => $email,
669                'password' => $password,
670                'locale' => $lang,
671                'ip_address' => $ipAddress,
672            ]);
673        } catch (\Exception $e) {
674            $account->delete();
675            throw $e;
676        }
677
678        $account->populateDefaultFields();
679
680        return $account;
681    }
682
683    /**
684     * Populates all the default column that should be there when a new account
685     * is created or reset.
686     */
687    public function populateDefaultFields()
688    {
689        app(PopulateContactFieldTypesTable::class)->execute([
690            'account_id' => $this->id,
691            'migrate_existing_data' => true,
692        ]);
693
694        $this->populateDefaultGendersTable();
695        $this->populateDefaultReminderRulesTable();
696        $this->populateRelationshipTypeGroupsTable();
697        $this->populateRelationshipTypesTable();
698        $this->populateActivityTypeTable();
699
700        app(PopulateLifeEventsTable::class)->execute([
701            'account_id' => $this->id,
702            'migrate_existing_data' => true,
703        ]);
704
705        app(PopulateModulesTable::class)->execute([
706            'account_id' => $this->id,
707            'migrate_existing_data' => true,
708        ]);
709    }
710
711    /**
712     * Gets the RelationshipType object matching the given type.
713     *
714     * @param  string  $relationshipTypeName
715     * @return RelationshipType|null
716     */
717    public function getRelationshipTypeByType(string $relationshipTypeName)
718    {
719        return $this->relationshipTypes->where('name', $relationshipTypeName)->first();
720    }
721
722    /**
723     * Gets the RelationshipType object matching the given type.
724     *
725     * @param  string  $relationshipTypeGroupName
726     * @return RelationshipTypeGroup|null
727     */
728    public function getRelationshipTypeGroupByType(string $relationshipTypeGroupName)
729    {
730        return $this->relationshipTypeGroups->where('name', $relationshipTypeGroupName)->first();
731    }
732
733    /**
734     * Get the first available locale in an account. This gets the first user
735     * in the account and reads his locale.
736     *
737     * @return string|null
738     *
739     * @throws ModelNotFoundException
740     */
741    public function getFirstLocale(): ?string
742    {
743        try {
744            $user = $this->users()->firstOrFail();
745        } catch (ModelNotFoundException $e) {
746            return null;
747        }
748
749        return $user->locale;
750    }
751}
